# Security Policy

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Please do not disclose security issues publicly before the project team has had a chance to investigate. Send a private report with reproduction steps, affected version, and impact assessment to the maintainers.

## Supported Versions

Only the latest alpha release line is considered supported for security fixes during scaffolding.

## Sensitive Data Handling

- Never include API keys, secrets, session tokens, or balances in bug reports.
- Reproduce issues using simulation mode whenever possible.
- Treat local audit logs and database exports as sensitive artifacts.
